mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_histories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (check_out_date IS NULL OR check_out_date >= CURDATE())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_histories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND check_in_date > CURDATE() AND (check_out_date IS NULL OR check_out_date >= CURDATE())

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rooms r WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM residence_histories rh WHERE rh.room_id = r.id AND rh.deleted_at IS NULL AND rh.check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (rh.check_out_date IS NULL OR rh.check_out_date >= CURDATE()) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_histories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND ( (check_out_date IS NULL AND planned_checkout_date IS NOT NULL AND planned_checkout_date >= CURDATE() AND planned_checkout_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) OR (check_out_date IS NOT NULL AND check_out_date >= CURDATE() AND check_out_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_histories WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND check_in_date <= CURDATE() AND (check_out_date IS NULL OR check_out_date >= CURDATE()) AND DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), check_in_date) >= #{minDays}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.room_id) FROM residence_histories a JOIN residence_histories b ON a.room_id = b.room_id AND a.id < b.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL AND a.check_in_date <= LAST_DAY(CURDATE()) AND (a.check_out_date IS NULL OR a.check_out_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')) AND b.check_in_date <= LAST_DAY(CURDATE()) AND (b.check_out_date IS NULL OR b.check_out_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')) AND a.check_in_date <= IFNULL(b.check_out_date, '9999-12-31') AND IFNULL(a.check_out_date, '9999-12-31') >= b.check_in_date
